hero.title: Awaken ambitions, reveal potentials
hero.subtitle: A supportive, neutral and action-oriented approach

intro.title: Build and secure the professional future
points: Career Development Counseling (CEP) is a personalized support scheme that enables each employee to actively steer their professional path.
Our approach, both supportive and demanding, helps talents succeed in transitions, develop employability and find lasting meaning in their careers.

steps.title: Typical CEP journey
steps.subtitle: A structured support in 4 stages, adapted to each profile and objective

items.title: Framing
items.desc: In-depth analysis of the situation and the beneficiary's specific needs.

items.title: Exploration
items.desc: Comprehensive diagnostic of skills, values, motivations and potential barriers.

items.title: Construction
items.desc: Formalization of a concrete and personalized action plan.

items.title: Follow-up
items.desc: Step-by-step support, adjustments and evaluation of results.

items.title: Skills assessments
items.description: In-depth analysis of professional and personal abilities to reveal hidden potential.

items.title: Potential evaluations
items.description: Identification of high-potential talents to anticipate evolution and succession.

items.title: Group workshops
items.description: Collaborative sessions for networking and professional development.

items.title: Mobility support
items.description: Personalized support for internal and external transitions.

cta.title: Ready to develop your talents?
cta.subtitle: Get a premium diagnostic to assess your CEP needs
